vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for #1287 (feat(vbrief): task vbrief:reconcile:graph); part of the #742 decomposition.

narratives.Description: Build the cascade-unblock walker: a verb that promotes vBRIEFs whose swarm.depends_on[] all resolve to completed/ or cancelled/. Pure vBRIEF; forge-agnostic. Composes with the existing swarm_readiness.py dep-graph machinery.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: New verb + module under scripts/. Walks vbrief/proposed/, resolves depends_on against current state, runs task scope:promote on eligible candidates (respects WIP cap). Idempotent.
narratives.UserStory: As the framework, I want blocked children whose upstream resolved to auto-promote so the decomposition operates deterministically.

narrative.Acceptance: Single-dep, multi-dep, cycle, WIP-cap cases all behave per spec.

items.title: Tests for cascade, cycle detection, WIP cap interaction
